text: "Of the sons of Jonadab"... The Rechabites, of whom see Jer. 35. By this addition of the seventy-two interpreters, we gather that this psalm was usually sung in the synagogue, in the person of the Rechabites, and of those who were first carried away into captivity.
"Learning"... As much as to say, I build not upon human learning, but only on the power and justice of God.
